systems.name: opencode session runtime
systems.description: Local agent runtime that owns prompt assembly, compaction, and dispatch to LLM providers

containers.name: packages/opencode session module
containers.description: Houses prompt.ts, compaction.ts, working-cache.ts, post-compaction.ts, tool-invoker.ts

components.name: PromptAssembler
components.description: Top-level prompt assembly orchestrator in prompt.ts

components.name: PostAnchorTransformer
components.description: NEW: folds completed assistant turns beyond N=2 into trace markers + WorkingCache references

components.name: WorkingCacheWriter
components.description: Existing WorkingCache write API consumed by transformer for lazy-write fallback

components.name: SafetyNetGuard
components.description: NEW: counts transformed messages, falls back to raw when below threshold

components.name: TweaksConfigReader
components.description: Reads compaction.phase1Enabled, recentRawRounds, fallbackThreshold from tweaks.cfg

relationships.label: passes transformed messages for safety check
